title: inference.delete

dry_run.description: When true, checks the semantic_text fields and inference processors that reference the endpoint and returns them in a list, but does not delete the endpoint.

force.description: When true, the inference endpoint is forcefully deleted even if it is still being used by ingest processors or semantic text fields.

description:
Delete an inference endpoint.

This API requires the manage_inference cluster privilege (the built-in `inference_admin` role grants this privilege).
